author: yorickdowne
content:
For my own reference
Weak subjectivity, ~2 weeks, is 112,000 slots (3,500 epochs)
Safety margin, ~1+ month, is 262,144 slots (8,192 epochs)
CL block retention, ~4-5 months, is 1,056,768 slots (33,024 epochs)
Original 4444, 1 year, is 2,628,000 slots (82,125 epochs)

author: yorickdowne
content: All of those feel easy to communicate to users. Blob retention period, double blob retention period, consensus block retention period, respectively

author: yorickdowne
content: If you’d ask me to pick one as a node operator, I’d feel very comfortable with double blob retention period

author: yorickdowne
content: And comfortable with blob retention period
